accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context (CRA chapter 8 disapproval, NPS/DOI, 90 Fed. Reg. 2621, dates).

no_hallucinations.why: Added context (NPS is a DOI agency, CRA disapproval mechanism) is accurate and nothing is fabricated.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill's purpose is congressional disapproval nullifying the NPS Glen Canyon motor vehicles rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the chapter 8 of title 5 (Congressional Review Act) authority and that the targeted rule is voided.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no exceptions or conditions; summary correctly notes there are none.

effective_dates.why: Summary accurately states the House passage (Apr. 29), Senate passage (May 6, 8), and approval (May 23, 2025) dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: the disapproved rule shall have no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Tone is neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized, consistent, and reads clearly.

concise.why: Appropriately brief for a short resolution without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the National Park Service, Department of the Interior, and the Federal Register citation.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register citation (90 Fed. Reg. 2621) and all dates are stated correctly.
